nasb.text: Come, let us make our father drink wine, and let us lie with him that we may preserve our family through our father.”

esv.text: Come, let us make our father drink wine, and we will lie with him, that we may preserve offspring from our father.”

cnv.text: 來吧，我們可以叫父親喝酒，然後與他同睡，這樣我們可以藉著父親保全後裔。”

ccb.text: 不如我们灌醉父亲，然后跟他睡觉，借着他替我们一家传宗接代吧。”

csbs.text: 来吧！让我们给父亲喝酒，然后与他同睡，好藉着我们的父亲存留后裔！”
